issues.title: RC1 Error

comments.body:
> 3:
> How to init OpenAiChatModel ?

you can use builder. 

example:
```java
OpenAiChatModel chatModel = OpenAiChatModel.builder()
	.openAiApi(OpenAiApi.builder().apiKey(new SimpleApiKey("TEST")).build())
	.defaultOptions(defaultOptions)
	.build();
```
I suggest using autoconfiguraiton.  Please take a look at https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai-examples/tree/main/models/chat/helloworld
